nasb.text: “You shall not detest an Edomite, for he is your brother; you shall not detest an Egyptian, because you were an alien in his land.

esv.text: “You shall not abhor an Edomite, for he is your brother. You shall not abhor an Egyptian, because you were a sojourner in his land.

cnv.text: “你不可厭惡以東人，因為他是你的兄弟；不可厭惡埃及人，因為你在他的地上作過寄居的。

ccb.text: “不可憎恶以东人，因为他们是你们的弟兄；也不可憎恶埃及人，因为你们曾经在埃及寄居。
